notes: Confirm decision pre-staged: gzkit receipt surface (events.py 470L + ledger_semantics.py 547L + validate_pkg/ledger_check.py 379L + utils.capture_validation_anchor + temporal_drift.py + obpi_complete.py atomic transaction) is architecturally a strict superset of airlineops/opsdev/lib/validation_receipt.py (274L). gzkit has 17+ event types vs 3 fixed Literals, ObpiReceiptEvidence with nested ScopeAudit/GitSyncState/ReqProofInput vs dict[str,Any], CLI integration via gz obpi complete + gz adr emit-receipt, atomic transactions, and central .gzkit/ledger.jsonl vs per-ADR storage. The single narrow win for airlineops (typed ValidationAnchor instead of dict[str,str]) is not worth absorbing because it would require migrating every existing event in the gzkit ledger schema. Final decision subject to brief authoring in Stage 2.
